stdout | src/lib/ingredient-alias-persist-queue.test.ts > ingredient alias persist queue > serializes three rapid manual persists without losing prior keys
[canonical-create] alias-upsert-ok {
  aliasName: 'QUEIJO MOZARELLA 2KG',
  normalizedAlias: 'queijo mozarella',
  ingredientId: 'ing-QUEIJO MOZARELLA 2KG'
}
[manual_match_persist_result] {
  ok: true,
  itemName: 'QUEIJO MOZARELLA 2KG',
  ingredientId: 'ing-QUEIJO MOZARELLA 2KG',
  aliasLookupKey: 'metro::queijo mozarella',
  operationalAliasKey: 'queijo mozarella',
  normalizedAlias: 'queijo mozarella',
  keysWritten: [
    'metro::tomate cherry 500',
    'tomate cherry 500',
    'metro::bacon fatiado',
    'bacon fatiado',
    'metro::queijo mozarella',
    'queijo mozarella'
  ],
  dbUpsertAttempted: true,
  dbError: null
}
[unmatch_persist_state] {
  phase: 'after_manual_rematch_persist',
  itemName: 'QUEIJO MOZARELLA 2KG',
  ingredientId: 'ing-QUEIJO MOZARELLA 2KG',
  supplierName: 'Metro',
  clearedRejectedPairs: 0,
  persistOk: true,
  rejectedPairCount: 0
}
